plan.name: source-ramp-4to6
plan.description: Monotonically increase the main ion source current from 4 mA to 6 mA.
plan.rationale: Ramping source current requires a safe rate to prevent arc instability or power supply overshoot; using 0.25 mA/step with 2s dwell ensures stability and results in a total duration of 16 seconds, which is appropriate for this small change.
